name: Louise's Chocolate Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until yellow.
2. Add sugar and oil to the eggs; beat well.
3. Melt the chocolate.
4. Stir the melted chocolate into the egg mixture.
5. Sift together the flour, salt, cinnamon, baking powder, and baking soda.
6. Stir the sifted ingredients into the batter.
7. Pour the batter into oiled pans (angel food cake pan or 2 loaf pans).
8. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes (start with less time).
9. Allow to cool in the pans for 5-20 minutes.
10. Turn out onto a rack and allow to cool completely.
